## Safety, privacy & monetization guardrails

- [ ] Does not paywall any safety feature (block/report/verification/safety-center/
      women-only + verified-only filters stay free).
- [ ] Does not expose precise location to clients (fuzzed geocell centroids only).
- [ ] Respects 18+, fail-closed verification/moderation, GDPR/KVKK, EU/Frankfurt residency.
- [ ] Any premium gating goes through `checkFeatureAccess` with server-side entitlements.
